group_stage.upset_note: Upset bonus = 2 x (winner_tier_number - loser_tier_number). Fires only when the winner's tier number is higher (weaker) than the loser's: 1-tier gap = +2, 2-tier gap = +4, 3-tier gap = +6. Tiers come from tiers.json (all 48 teams), so the bonus fires whether or not the beaten team is drafted; points go only to the drafting owner of the winner.
group_stage.draw_upset_note: Draw-upset bonus: a lower-tier team (higher tier number) that draws a higher-tier team earns +0.5 for its drafting owner, on top of the +1 draw point. flat mode = a flat +0.5 regardless of gap; tier_gap mode = 0.5 x (lower_tier_number - higher_tier_number). Tiers come from tiers.json (all 48 teams), so it fires whether or not the stronger opponent is drafted. Only the lower-tier side earns it; equal-tier draws earn nothing extra.

knockout_stage.penalties_note: A penalty-shootout result is scored as a normal knockout win/loss: winner +3, loser 0, no draw point.

third_place_game.note: The third-place playoff is played; its winner earns the +3 knockout match-win point but no advancement bonus.

knockout_stage.advancement_note: An advancement bonus is earned for REACHING a round, i.e. by winning the match in the prior round. Winning an R32 match earns round_of_16 (reached R16); winning R16 earns quarterfinal; winning QF earns semifinal; winning SF earns final; winning the Final earns win_world_cup. The third-place game advances to nothing.
